programme.desc: Thelma Lou refuses to go with Barney to the town's upcoming dance unless he gets her visiting cousin Mary Grace a date. Just when he and Barney are about to give up, Gomer appears.

programme.desc: Gomer makes a citizen's arrest of Barney for an illegal U-turn, the same violation Barney has ticketed him for, causing him to overreact and resign as deputy.

programme.desc: Opie and his friends take their roles as Robin Hood's men seriously when they befriend a hobo.

programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's Department.
